key_signals: Mint authority NOT renounced — dev can mint at will
Ownership retained on the LP pair contract
Honeypot heuristic: sell tax 18%, buy tax 4%
verdicts.reasoning: Contract retains every escape hatch a maliciously-aligned dev needs: unrenounced mint, retained LP ownership, asymmetric transfer taxes. The holder concentration alone would suffice; combined with mint authority this is a textbook setup for a coordinated dump.

key_signals: Coordinated shilling: 6 accounts posted within a 4h window
Dev wallet went silent within hours of peak price
verdicts.reasoning: Classic pump-distribute fingerprint: synchronized promotional accounts, dev going dark at peak, fast community attrition.

key_signals: Dev wallet drained 1.2 SOL to a fresh address
verdicts.reasoning: Flow is the loudest signal: LP is being unwound at a rate that drains the pool inside 24h. Combined with a top-holder dump this is the exact sequence we'd expect immediately before a finishing-leg sell.
